title: HPU Date Sheet 2025 @ hpuniv.ac.in

detail.title: HPU Date Sheet 2025 @ hpuniv.ac.in
detail.short_info: The officials of HPU have released the HPU Date Sheet 2025 for B.A/B.Sc/B.Com. Students are advised to check the timetable to prepare for their exams.

content.text: HPU Date Sheet 2025 is Out! The Himachal Pradesh University has released the B.A/B.Sc/B.Com. Students can access their HPU Result 2025 using their registration number through the direct link here. For further updates on HPU, candidates can follow this page.

rows: Simple, Fast & Free! No Sign Up Required!

sections.heading: How to Download the HPU Date Sheet 2025?

content.text: Candidates follow the steps to download the Himachal Pradesh University Date Sheet 2025, candidates check the details and download it easily.

items: The University home page will open
The examination Schedules page will pop up
Date Sheet for different courses will show up for Regular and Regular / External.

sections.heading: Direct Link to Download HPU Date Sheet 2025

rows: Tentative date sheet for Under-Gradutate classes B.A./B.Sc/B.Com supplementary examinations in r/o CDOE (ICDEOL) January batch students annual examination to be held in Oct. 2025

Date-sheet for Ph.D. Course Work (CBCS) (English, Hindi, Sanskrit, Sociology, Public Administration, History, Commerce, Tourism Management, Management, Law, Physical Education) examinations to be held in September, 2025
Date-sheet for Ph.D Course work (Hindi, Psychology, Commerce, Economics Education, Journalism & Mass Communication) Examinations to be held in September, 2025
Date-sheet for MBBS examination (Old / New Syllabus) to be held in August, 2025
Revised Date-sheet for BAMS 3rd year (Batch 2020-21) Supplementary Examination to be held in September,2025
Date-sheet for B.A.M.S. 2nd Prof. , 3rd & 4th year Supplementary examination to be held in August, 2025
Datesheet for BDS 3rd year Examination to be held in August, 2025
Datesheet for PG Diploma in Tabla (Add-on Course) Examinations to be held in August, 2025
Revised Date-sheet for B.Ed 2nd & 4th Semester for Regular college and 1st & 2nd year (Annual System) for CDOE (ICDEOL) examinations to be held in July, 2025
Notification regarding change/Modifications in M.A. Education and Political Science Under CBSC paper due to UGC NET
Date-sheet for M.Ed (CBCS) examination to be held in June, 2025
Date-sheet for M.Ed 4th Semester examination to be held in June 2025
Date-sheet for M.A. (Education ) (Non CBCS)(January Batch ICDEOL) examination to be held in June, 2025
Date-sheet for M.A. Music 3rd & 4th Semester Re-appear examination to be held in June, 2025
Date sheet for Bachelor of Library and Information Science 1st Semester (CBCS) Examination to be held in July, 2025
